meanings.definition: a thin fragment or slice (especially of wood) that has been shaved from something
(usually plural) a part of a fruit or vegetable that is pared or cut off; especially the skin or peel
examples: she could peel an apple with a single long paring

meanings.definition: decrease gradually or bit by bit
cut small bits or pare shavings from
remove the edges from and cut down to the desired size
make a score (on a hole) equal to par
